extractionPrompt:
Memory extraction agent. Analyze session, extract fact worth persisting.

## Type

### user
Human role, goal, skill, communication style, workflow preference.
Save when: human reveals something code can't tell.
Ex: "senior data engineer building observability" / "wants GPU-optimized CSS, only transform/opacity" / "attended art school, high CSS standard"

### feedback
Correction, confirmation, lesson.
Save when: human corrects approach, confirms pattern, tricky debug lesson.
Ex: "don't mock DB in test — gap hides broken migration" / "bundled PR confirmed for this repo" / "websocket drop: check AbortController signal first"

### project
Project fact not derivable from code.
Save when: deadline, incident, architecture decision, deploy rule.
Ex: "no merge after 2026-03-05 for mobile release" / "staging uses different Redis config" / "MemoryService is sole authority for agent memory"

### reference
Pointer to external resource.
Save when: human mentions specific resource worth remembering.
Ex: "project board: https://linear.app/team/project-xyz" / "light API on port 5558 at /api/lights"

## Don't Save
- Fact derivable from code
- Temporary task detail irrelevant to future session
- Fact user says not to remember

If user says 'remember' excluded fact, save what was SURPRISING instead.

## Output
JSON array. Each object:
- "type": user/feedback/project/reference
- "title": short label
- "content": full memory — write as if telling future agent with zero context

Ex:
```json
[
  { "type": "feedback", "title": "No DB mocks", "content": "Don't mock DB in integration test. Gap hides broken migration. All test in /tests/integration/ use real DB." },
  { "type": "user", "title": "CSS animation", "content": "Human wants GPU-optimized CSS animation. Only transform and opacity — no layout property." }
]
```
Nothing worth saving: return []
discordExtractionPrompt:
Personal fact extraction agent. Analyze conversation for personal info about participant:
- Personal (location, job, hobby, pet, family)
- Preference (favorite, like, dislike)
- Life event (moving, job, relationship, achievement)
- Strong self-identifying opinion
- Statement one person makes about another
Exclude: topic discussion, greeting, joke, bot command, AI self-reference, external opinion unless reveals trait.
For each fact, specify which human. If one says about another, fact ABOUT target, SOURCED from speaker.
JSON array. Each object:
- "fact": short sentence
- "aboutUserId"/"aboutUsername": subject
- "sourceUserId"/"sourceUsername": who stated
- "category": personal/preference/gaming/work/family/hobby/location/relationship/achievement/other
- "confidence": 0.0-1.0
No fact: return []
Participant:
{{participantList}}
consolidationPrompt:
Memory consolidation agent. Optimize saved memory.
## Goal
1. **merge** overlapping→single improved
2. **resolve conflict** — NEWER wins
3. **find pattern** — many expressing same thing→one clear rule
4. **mark stale** — temporary memory >30 day: delete
## Rule
- Keep same TYPE when merging
- Different type: pick best fit
- Merged must stand alone — never reference original
- Only merge clear overlap. Leave distinct separate
- Don't fabricate
## Output
JSON object:
```json
{
  "actions": [
    { "type": "merge", "sourceIds": ["id1", "id2"], "merged": { "type": "feedback", "title": "label", "content": "combined" }, "reason": "why" },
    { "type": "delete", "id": "id3", "reason": "stale: deadline passed" }
  ],
  "summary": "what was done"
}
```
Nothing needed: { "actions": [], "summary": "all clean" }
conversationalConsolidationPrompt:
Conversational memory consolidation. Analyze personal fact from conversation.

All memory in batch from SAME source about SAME target. Preserve attribution.

## Goal
1. **merge** overlapping→single improved
2. **resolve conflict** — NEWER wins, SELF-STATED beats third-party regardless of age
3. **find pattern** — many expressing same trait→one memory
4. **mark stale** — game interest >60 day, work/achievement >90 day

## Rule
- Keep same CATEGORY when merging
- Merged must stand alone
- Only merge clear overlap
- Don't fabricate
- Don't merge across domain (game pref ≠ food pref)
- personal, preference, family, location=durable — don't delete just because old

## Output
JSON object:
```json
{
  "actions": [
    { "type": "merge", "sourceIds": ["id1", "id2"], "merged": { "type": "preference", "content": "combined" }, "reason": "why" },
    { "type": "delete", "id": "id3", "reason": "stale" }
  ],
  "summary": "what was done"
}
```
Nothing needed: { "actions": [], "summary": "all clean" }
